title: SimpleLocalize Translation Structure
description: Documentation of the translation data structure returned by the SimpleLocalize API

fields.name: key
fields.description: Translation key identifier. Used to reference this translation in application code (e.g., HELLO_WORLD, nav.home.title)

fields.name: namespace
fields.description: Logical grouping namespace for organizing translation keys (e.g., common, navigation, checkout)

fields.name: language
fields.description: IETF language tag identifying the target language (e.g., en, fr, zh-Hans)

fields.name: text
fields.description: The actual translated text content. May be empty for untranslated strings.

fields.name: reviewStatus
fields.description: Review workflow status indicating whether a human reviewer has approved this translation

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: Customer segment identifier for white-label or multi-tenant translation overrides

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent modification to this translation
